description: A job hiring platform for Korean-speaking foreigners. Connects foreign talent who can speak Korean with verified job postings from employers.

web.description: Main web application for job seekers and employers

admin.description: Admin dashboard for managing job posts and users

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Google OAuth login via Supabase Auth

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Homepage with hero section, stats, how it works, job preview

features.name: Job Listings
features.description: Browse job posts with filters by nationality, location, sorting

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: Profile creation for seekers (nationality, TOPIK level) and employers (company name)

features.name: My Page
features.description: User profile management and liked jobs

user_roles.description: Job seekers who are foreigners looking for jobs in Korea

test_account.note: User can use their own Google account for testing
